queries.title: IWS Pending Messages
queries.description: Gets the count of PENDING outbound messages today, grouped by message type. WARNING: Must be connected to the IWS DB server.

sql_blocks.label: Check Pending Messages
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT MessageName, COUNT(*) AS PendingCount
    FROM OutboundHostMessages WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'ERROR')
      AND CAST(createtime AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
    GROUP BY MessageName
    ORDER BY PendingCount DESC
